name: climate-negotiations
topic: climate change negotiations between developed and developing nations

rubrics: Facts should identify the key blocs or camps and keep their positions separate.
Facts should cover emission targets, financing mechanisms, and free-rider dynamics with specifics rather than generic statements.
Facts should include a timeline of negotiation moves or commitments when it changes the analysis.
Facts should avoid flattening the situation into generic climate-policy commentary.
Every player entity should be a genuine actor with independent agency — name specific actors rather than generic blocs when possible.
Each player should have objectives that reflect their distinct position and incentives.
The player set should cover the key decision-makers without inflating the count with observers, commentators, or abstract forces.
